unresolved: Bugs found and fixed during this work: model pattern word-boundary failed on bare 'Qwen2.5-Math-7B'; linter had three false results (section-prefix comparison, duplicate-ban verb-only match, dot-excluding character class). All now covered by regression tests.

'./harness install' cannot force-overwrite inside this sandbox's mounted folder (unlink not permitted). Environment restriction, not harness logic: force-overwrite verified working under /tmp. Installed .claude/.codex copies were resynced from canonical by truncate-write.
